notableEvents.label: Johnathan Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Johnathan Rodríguez grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Juan Brito to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Johnathan Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Johnathan Rodríguez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Johnathan Rodríguez grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Juan Brito to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Johnathan Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Weston Wilson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Orioles challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Weston Wilson hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hedges reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Trevor Rogers, assist to first baseman Pete Alonso.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Juan Brito. Pete Alonso to 3rd. Johnathan Rodríguez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Beavers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Beavers reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Juan Brito. Pete Alonso scores. Johnathan Rodríguez to 3rd. Jeremiah Jackson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser flies out sharply to left fielder Angel Martínez.
